candidate_check.description: Windows Server 2022 Remote Desktop Services must require secure Remote Procedure Call (RPC) communications.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services\

Value Name: fEncryptRPCTraffic

Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00000001 (1)
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Remote Desktop Services >> Remote Desktop Session Host >> Security >> Require secure RPC communication to "Enabled".
title: Windows Server 2022 Remote Desktop Services must require secure Remote Procedure Call (RPC) communications.
